situation: audit-2026-07-02-006 finding L-002 (priority 9, route-fix): SKILL.md L54 states '终态不可再修改' but event-client.js L193-200 actually allows payload-only updates on terminal events (status=null + newPayloadFields non-empty). Documentation contradicts code behavior.
action: Updated SKILL.md L54 to accurately describe the actual behavior: terminal status cannot be changed, but payload fields can still be appended (e.g. observation_result after SUCCESS). This aligns docs with the intentional code design that supports post-terminal payload merges.
outcome_evidence: Commit bbf30dd on auto/opt-prod-deploy-1782970212. git diff confirms single-line change: '终态不可再修改' → '终态后 status 不可再修改；但仍可追加 payload 字段（如 observation_result）'. Pushed to remote.
next_suggestion: All derived_fixes from audit-2026-07-02-006 and audit-2026-07-02-007 now merged. Update audit-cycle-state to cycle-complete; next round triggers new full audit on an unaudited project (e.g. moni-master or personal-assistant).
